message:
refactor: remove uring-fs dependency, use UnixVfs on all unix platforms

Eliminates the io_uring / glibc dependency that prevented musl (static)
builds on Linux. The pure-Rust UnixVfs (POSIX fcntl locks + std::fs)
is now the sole file-backed VFS on all unix platforms.

- Remove linux-uring-fs and linux-asupersync-uring feature flags from
  fsqlite-vfs, fsqlite-core, fsqlite, fsqlite-cli, and fsqlite-e2e
- Remove uring module from fsqlite-vfs compilation
- Simplify PagerBackend to Memory + Unix (no IoUring variant)
- Update all #[cfg] gates from target_os = "linux" to just unix
- Merge IoUring and Unix pager backend tests into single unix test
- Cargo.lock updated to drop uring-fs, pollster, io-uring deps

Fixes downstream glibc 2.39 compatibility issues (beads_rust #86).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
